lessons.title: Bard Fundamentals
lessons.description: Learn the core principles of Bard: the 3-song cycle, party buffs from each song, and the rhythm of switching between them.
keyPoints: Songs provide party-wide buffs: Wanderer's (crit), Mage's (damage), Army's (direct hit)
Standard rotation: Wanderer's Minuet -> Mage's Ballad -> Army's Paeon -> repeat
Each song has a unique secondary effect during its 45s duration
Switch songs when <3s remaining to avoid dead time
tips: Watch the song timer - switching early loses damage, switching late creates gaps
Start fights with Wanderer's Minuet for the crit buff during opener

lessons.title: Repertoire Mastery
lessons.description: Master Wanderer's Minuet phase: generating Repertoire stacks from DoT crits and spending them optimally with Pitch Perfect.
keyPoints: Repertoire stacks only generate during Wanderer's Minuet (from DoT crits)
Pitch Perfect at 3 stacks = maximum potency (540) - don't use at 1-2 stacks
Use Pitch Perfect before song ends to avoid wasting stacks
Empyreal Arrow guarantees one Repertoire proc during WM
tips: At 2 stacks with <3s on WM, use PP anyway - losing 2 stacks is worse than optimal potency
More crit = more Repertoire procs - this is why WM aligns with raid buffs

lessons.title: Soul Voice & Apex Arrow
lessons.description: Understand Soul Voice gauge management and the powerful Apex Arrow -> Blast Arrow combo.
keyPoints: Soul Voice builds passively during combat from Repertoire procs
Apex Arrow at 80+ gauge unlocks Blast Arrow (the follow-up)
Use at 100 gauge to prevent overcapping - never sit at full gauge
Prioritize Apex during burst windows for buff stacking
tips: Apex Arrow is a line AoE - position to hit multiple targets when possible
In burst, Apex at 80+ is fine - waiting for 100 may miss buffs

lessons.title: Proc Management
lessons.description: Master Hawk's Eye procs, Refulgent Arrow priority, and the devastating Barrage + Resonant Arrow combination.
keyPoints: Straight Shot Ready has ~35% proc rate from Burst Shot
Refulgent Arrow is your highest priority proc consumer - never let it fall off
Barrage + Refulgent = triple damage (840 potency total)
Resonant Arrow is a free follow-up after Barrage - don't forget it
tips: Hold Barrage for Refulgent Arrow proc when possible
Barrage has a 120s cooldown - align with your 2-minute burst

lessons.title: DoT Optimization
lessons.description: Learn optimal DoT uptime, Iron Jaws refresh windows, and buff snapshotting for maximum damage.
keyPoints: Both DoTs last 45s - refresh at 3-7s remaining for optimal uptime
Iron Jaws refreshes both DoTs simultaneously - never apply them separately
DoTs snapshot buffs at application time - refresh during Raging Strikes
Stormbite first (higher potency) if applying fresh DoTs
tips: Iron Jaws during burst snapshots the buffed damage for the full 45s duration
DoT crits fuel Repertoire and Soul Voice - 100% uptime is critical

lessons.title: Burst Window Execution
lessons.description: Master the 2-minute burst window: Raging Strikes, Battle Voice, Radiant Finale timing, and party coordination.
keyPoints: Burst sequence: Raging Strikes -> Battle Voice -> Radiant Finale
Align burst with Wanderer's Minuet for maximum Repertoire
Radiant Finale potency scales with Coda (1-3 songs used)
Radiant Encore is a free follow-up proc from Radiant Finale
tips: Battle Voice is a party buff - coordinate with other DPS burst windows
Iron Jaws during Raging Strikes snapshots buffed DoTs for 45s

lessons.title: Advanced Coordination
lessons.description: Learn oGCD weaving, Bloodletter charge management during Mage's Ballad, and party support utility.
keyPoints: Empyreal Arrow every 15s - guarantees Repertoire during WM
Bloodletter resets during Mage's Ballad - spam it freely
Troubadour for raidwides, Nature's Minne for healing buffs
Head Graze coordinates via IPC for interrupt priority
tips: During MB, Bloodletter resets constantly - don't hold charges
Sidewinder on cooldown for oGCD damage, especially during burst
